targets.queryText: SELECT 'Week' AS "Comparison", ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'week' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS "Current Period", ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'week' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0) AS "Previous Period", ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'week' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'week' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0) AS "Delta" UNION ALL SELECT 'Month', ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'month' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), 0), ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'month' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0), ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'month' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'month' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'Quarter', ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), 0), ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0), ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'Year', ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'year' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), 0), ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'year' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0), ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'year' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'year' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0);

SELECT 'MV Delta' AS "Metric", ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'week' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'week' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0) AS "WoW", ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'month' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'month' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0) AS "MoM", ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0) AS "QoQ", ROUND((SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'year' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'year' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 0) AS "YoY" UNION ALL SELECT 'TWR %', ROUND((SELECT twr_period_pct FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'week' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT twr_period_pct FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'week' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 2), ROUND((SELECT twr_period_pct FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'month' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT twr_period_pct FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'month' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 2), ROUND((SELECT twr_period_pct FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT twr_period_pct FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 2), ROUND((SELECT twr_period_pct FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'year' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT twr_period_pct FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'year' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 2) UNION ALL SELECT 'Income $', ROUND((SELECT dividends_received_period FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'week' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT dividends_received_period FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'week' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 2), ROUND((SELECT dividends_received_period FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'month' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT dividends_received_period FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'month' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 2), ROUND((SELECT dividends_received_period FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT dividends_received_period FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 2), ROUND((SELECT dividends_received_period FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'year' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT dividends_received_period FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'year' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 2);

SELECT 'MV Growth' AS "Metric", CASE WHEN (SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) > (SELECT mv_delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) THEN 'Accelerating' ELSE 'Decelerating' END AS "QoQ Trend" UNION ALL SELECT 'Income Growth', CASE WHEN (SELECT dividends_received_period FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) > (SELECT dividends_received_period FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) THEN 'Accelerating' ELSE 'Decelerating' END UNION ALL SELECT 'Goal Progress', CASE WHEN (SELECT goal_progress_pct FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) > (SELECT goal_progress_pct FROM period_summary WHERE period_type = 'quarter' AND is_rolling = 0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) THEN 'Accelerating' ELSE 'Decelerating' END;
